name: Japan qualification review seed pack
change_note: Initial country seed pack with routing requirements only; official Japan sources must be checked per case.

regulator_map.notes: Verify product classification, importer/distributor responsibility, labeling, and notification/approval path.
Verify electrical safety, radio, battery, and product marking obligations.
Verify trademark owner, status, class, and territory when brand rights affect the decision.

checklist_hints: Verify Japanese importer/distributor responsibility, Japanese-language labeling, classification, claims, and platform-site eligibility.
Escalate when classification may shift a product into food with function claims, quasi-drug, medical, wireless, battery, or child-safety routes.

requirements.requirement: Verify Japan product classification, responsible importer/distributor path, and Japanese label/claims obligations.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve regulated Japan routes until classification and label obligations are verified.
requirements.notes: Seed routing requirement; use official sources or qualified local review for high-risk categories.

sources.title: MHLW: Food Sanitation Act
sources.confirms: Japan food safety route should be checked through MHLW food safety and Food Sanitation Act information.

sources.title: MHLW: Pharmaceutical and Medical Device Safety Information
sources.confirms: Japan pharmaceutical, medical device, quasi-drug, and cosmetics routes should be checked through MHLW where classification may apply.

sources.title: METI: Product Safety
sources.confirms: Japan product safety obligations for consumer products should be checked through METI product safety information.

sources.title: Japan Patent Office: Trademark
sources.confirms: Japan trademark status, owner, class, and territory should be checked through Japan Patent Office trademark resources.

gaps: Add current official Japan sources for food/supplements, cosmetics/quasi-drugs, electronics/wireless, and import/customs.
Add golden cases before marking validated.
